title: Data Version
description: Deterministic identifier for the state of a dataset at a point in time. Two queries with the same version token always return identical data, enabling reproducibility for model training and backtesting.

version.description: Opaque version token. Deterministic hash of (station, sorted observation timestamps). as_of is metadata only and NOT included in the hash — identical observations queried at different times produce the same token.

as_of.description: Query timestamp (UTC ISO 8601). The watermark — data after this point is excluded.

latest_observation.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent observation included. Null if no observations.

observation_count.description: Number of observations included in the version.

$comment: VERSIONING DESIGN: The version token is a short SHA-256 hash of station + sorted(observation_timestamps). as_of is metadata only and NOT in the hash. Same version = same dataset, guaranteed. Use to detect stale cached results or to label training data provenance.
